methodology.confidence: high if CH weekly with 30+ non-zero weeks in last 52

recommendations.opportunity: Expand trail running shoe wall and summer trail apparel
recommendations.evidence_summary: CH search 12w avg 57.83/100, velocity 112.2%. US search 12w avg 27.25/100, velocity 11.2%. US-CH velocity gap -101.0pp. Corroboration score 0.5; source types: search.
recommendations.transferability: Strong active CH search interest (12w avg 58/100). Suitable for Swiss outdoor retailers this season.
recommendations.recommended_action: Merchandise dedicated trail running bay with gait-analysis service
recommendations.risks: Seasonal spike may fade after summer; verify sell-through vs road running

recommendations.opportunity: Via ferrata harnesses, lanyards, helmets, and alpine access kit
recommendations.evidence_summary: CH search 12w avg 28.25/100, velocity 346.1%. US search 12w avg 10.83/100, velocity 348.3%. US-CH velocity gap 2.2pp. Corroboration score 0.733; source types: search, competitor.
recommendations.transferability: Moderate CH search signal; validate with competitor scans before buy.
recommendations.recommended_action: Bundle via ferrata starter sets with SAC partnership

recommendations.opportunity: Bikepacking bags, ultralight camping crossover, and gravel-adjacent kit
recommendations.evidence_summary: CH search 12w avg 61.25/100, velocity 40.8%. US search 12w avg 81.42/100, velocity 44.3%. US-CH velocity gap 3.5pp. Corroboration score 0.733; source types: search, competitor.
recommendations.transferability: Strong active CH search interest (12w avg 61/100). Suitable for Swiss outdoor retailers this season.
recommendations.recommended_action: Create bikepacking starter capsule (pack, tent, sleep system) in bike corners
recommendations.risks: Niche audience; needs staff education to avoid confusion with touring

recommendations.opportunity: Ski touring boots, bindings, skins, and safety equipment
recommendations.evidence_summary: CH search 12w avg 11.92/100, velocity -61.6%. US search 12w avg 0.67/100, velocity 66.7%. US-CH velocity gap 128.3pp. Corroboration score 0.733; source types: search, competitor.
recommendations.transferability: US search momentum leads CH by 128pp — early transfer candidate if assortment gap confirmed at Transa/Ochsner.
recommendations.risks: Off-season in June; signal is winter-forward

recommendations.opportunity: Premium synthetic insulation (Alpha Direct) in ultralight mid-layers
recommendations.evidence_summary: CH search 12w avg 0.92/100, velocity -87.2%. US search 12w avg 71.25/100, velocity 36.6%. US-CH velocity gap 123.8pp. Corroboration score 0.5; source types: search.
recommendations.transferability: US search momentum leads CH by 124pp — early transfer candidate if assortment gap confirmed at Transa/Ochsner.
recommendations.recommended_action: Test 3–5 Alpha Direct mid-layers if supplier access confirmed
recommendations.risks: Very low CH search volume; trend may stay enthusiast-only

recommendations.opportunity: Recycled down jackets and sleeping bags for sustainability positioning
recommendations.evidence_summary: US search 12w avg 58.42/100, velocity 157.7%. Corroboration score 0.5; source types: search.
recommendations.transferability: Low-volume CH signal; interest detected in Zurich (100). Needs competitor assortment corroboration.
recommendations.recommended_action: Tag and filter recycled-down SKUs; staff sustainability storytelling
recommendations.risks: Low search volume in CH; rely on assortment audit not search alone

recommendations.opportunity: Sub-kilo sleep systems for fast alpine and bikepacking customers
recommendations.evidence_summary: US search 12w avg 64.0/100, velocity 170.4%. Corroboration score 0.5; source types: search.
recommendations.transferability: Low-volume CH signal; interest detected in Vaud (100), Zurich (100). Needs competitor assortment corroboration.
recommendations.recommended_action: Curate ultralight sleep system bay linked to fast-hiking narrative
recommendations.risks: Sparse CH time series; corroborate with product sales if available
